title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CANDUAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CANDUAL, MUNICIPALITY OF PANAY, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, TO JUSTICE JOSE HONTIVEROS MEMORIAL SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 18962 / 85 OG No. 51, 59 Supp (Dec. 18, 1989)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6773, November 29, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CANDUAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CANDUAL, MUNICIPALITY OF PANAY, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, TO JUSTICE JOSE HONTIVEROS MEMORIAL SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Candual Elementary School in Barangay Candual, Municipality of Panay, Province of Capiz, shall hereafter be known as the Justice Jose Hontiveros Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 18, 1989 and September 15, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Approved: November 29, 1989

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
